attributes.title: [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Administrative Operations
attributes.description: Administrative Activity Log events: control plane CRUD operations, failures, operation duration, and mutation rates. Identify failed deployments and permission issues.

params.markdown:
## [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Administrative Operations

This dashboard monitors Azure Resource Manager administrative operations:
- Administrative event volume and failure rates
- Operation duration and ARM latency (p95)
- Mutation vs read operation patterns
- Top failed operations and error details
- Top callers by individual identity and failure count
- Recent failed operations drill-down

query.esql:
FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| STATS total = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| STATS total = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| STATS failed = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| STATS failed = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.result.type NOT IN ("Start", "Started")
| STATS total = COUNT(*), failed = COUNT(*) WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| EVAL failure_rate = CASE(total > 0, TO_DOUBLE(failed) / total, 0.0)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.result.type NOT IN ("Start", "Started")
| STATS total = COUNT(*), failed = COUNT(*) WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| EVAL failure_rate = CASE(total > 0, TO_DOUBLE(failed) / total, 0.0)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.operation.duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_duration = AVG(azure.operation.duration)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.operation.duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_duration = AVG(azure.operation.duration)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.operation.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name LIKE "*WRITE*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*DELETE*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*ACTION*"
| STATS mutations = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.operation.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.operation.name LIKE "*WRITE*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*DELETE*" OR azure.operation.name LIKE "*ACTION*"
| STATS mutations = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.operation.name == "MICROSOFT.RESOURCES/DEPLOYMENTS/WRITE"
| STATS deployments = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.operation.name == "MICROSOFT.RESOURCES/DEPLOYMENTS/WRITE"
| STATS deployments = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| EVAL result_group = CASE(azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed"), "Failed", azure.result.type IN ("Success", "Succeeded", "Accept", "Activated", "Resolved", "Updated", "Active"), "Success", "InProgress")
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), result_group
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| EVAL result_group = CASE(azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed"), "Failed", azure.result.type IN ("Success", "Succeeded", "Accept", "Activated", "Resolved", "Updated", "Active"), "Success", "InProgress")
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), result_group
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.operation.duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS p95_duration = PERCENTILE(azure.operation.duration, 95.0) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.operation.duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS p95_duration = PERCENTILE(azure.operation.duration, 95.0) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| WHERE azure.operation.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_count = COUNT(*) BY azure.operation.name
| SORT failed_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| WHERE azure.operation.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_count = COUNT(*) BY azure.operation.name
| SORT failed_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.correlation_id IS NOT NULL
| EVAL caller = COALESCE(user.id, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.id, "unknown")
| STATS op_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(azure.correlation_id), failures = COUNT_DISTINCT(azure.correlation_id) WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed") BY caller, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type
| SORT op_count DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.correlation_id IS NOT NULL
| EVAL caller = COALESCE(user.id, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.id, "unknown")
| STATS op_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(azure.correlation_id), failures = COUNT_DISTINCT(azure.correlation_id) WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed") BY caller, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type
| SORT op_count DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.result.type IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.correlation_id IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_result = CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS", @timestamp), "|", azure.result.type)
| STATS latest = MV_LAST(MV_SORT(VALUES(ts_result))) BY azure.correlation_id
| EVAL result_type = MV_LAST(SPLIT(latest, "|"))
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY result_type
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 8

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.result.type IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.correlation_id IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_result = CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS", @timestamp), "|", azure.result.type)
| STATS latest = MV_LAST(MV_SORT(VALUES(ts_result))) BY azure.correlation_id
| EVAL result_type = MV_LAST(SPLIT(latest, "|"))
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY result_type
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 8

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.operation.name, azure.result.type, azure.result.description, user.id, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type, network.peer.address, azure.correlation_id
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
| WHERE azure.category == "Administrative"
| WHERE azure.result.type IN ("Failure", "Failed")
| KEEP @timestamp, azure.operation.name, azure.result.type, azure.result.description, user.id, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.type, network.peer.address, azure.correlation_id
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100
